rules_enforced.change: After check_exit() returns (False, ''), check ob.bid_yes/bid_no for None. If None, emit logger.warning('Exit check skipped trade=%d %s reason=empty_ob (held_bid=None)').
rules_enforced.location: bot_core.py — after check_exit() call in exit loop

rules_enforced.evidence: CLOSE logger.info already present on normal close path (reason/pnl logged) and market_resolved path. No silent closes found.

rules_enforced.change: When held_bid=None, parses ts_open via parse_utc_dt(). If time since open > STALE_OB_WARN_SECONDS (env, default 300s), emits logger.warning('STALE OB trade=%d ... position may be stuck'). Forced exit deferred — warning is mandatory per task spec.

Replaced `mkt = _market_by_id(...) or _dummy_market(trade)` with explicit check: if _market_by_id returns None, emit logger.warning('Exit using dummy market for trade=%d market_id=%s — no live discovery match') then assign _dummy_market(trade).
rules_enforced.location: bot_core.py — exit loop before ob = get_orderbook_snapshot(mkt)

rules_enforced.evidence: Cooldowns set for: near_resolution (600s), stop_loss (1800s), gap_stop (3600s). Confirmed NO cooldown for: take_profit, trailing_stop, market_resolved, time_exit. Pattern is consistent.

rules_enforced.change: Changed `logger.warning('Exit check error trade=%s: %s', trade.id, e)` to `logger.error('Exit check error trade=%d: %s', trade.id, e, exc_info=True)`. Full traceback now captured.
